features.name: combinational_loop_with_ternary_and_output_feedback
features.description: Code should include a combinational feedback loop where a wire is assigned based on an output port, and that output port is assigned based on the wire via a ternary operator

features.name: ternary_operator_on_output_port_bits
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator where the select condition depends on bits of an output port that is also being assigned
